_description: Tests EntersAsCopy replacement + inherited triggers + additional subtypes/keywords. Plan: P1 casts Mockingbird for {X}{U} with X=1 (MV=2, total mana spent=2). As it enters, the optional replacement lets it enter as a copy of Heartfire Hero (MV=1, legal because <=2). The copy IS Heartfire Hero PLUS additionally Bird with Flying. It should inherit Valiant and the 'dies -> damage = power to each opponent' trigger. Then cast Rabid Gnaw targeting the Mockingbird-copy -> Valiant fires (first time this turn for THIS creature; the original Heartfire Hero's per-turn target flag is independent), +1/+1 counter. Attack for flying damage. If it dies, dies-trigger fires because the copy has Heartfire Hero's text. Common engine bugs: (1) copy loses triggered abilities, (2) Bird/Flying not stacking additively with copied subtypes, (3) Valiant flag keyed off card name rather than entity ID so original Heartfire Hero's flag blocks the copy's trigger, (4) X-cost mana-value not tracked so Mockingbird refuses legal copy targets.
